meaning: adj.雷鸣的,雷一般响亮的,非常的<口>极大的,异乎寻常的n.打雷adv.非常,异常
examples: To them security is a steel river thundering on a concrete road.
She rushed outside in time to see a half-mile wide mud and sand thundering down the hill toward them, knocking over hundreds of trees.
The audience went wild with approval as many rose to their feet thundering their applause.
Centre Burrell was the first to react to the ricochet, collecting the ball and thundering over.
